name: jp.co.unvgi.vtuber-system-base.stage-lighting-volume-output-adapter
displayName: VTuberSystemBase Stage / Lighting / Volume Output Adapter
description: Main-output-side adapter that bridges stage-lighting-volume-tab IPC contracts to the Unity main output scene. Subscribes stage/* / light/* / volume/override/* / preview/* topics through the output-renderer-shell IOutputCommandDispatcher, drives Addressables-backed stage swap, GameObject-based Light add/remove, URP VolumeProfile override application, and a PreviewCamera+RenderTexture host. The adapter owns Stage / Lights / Cameras / Volume runtime state under IOutputSceneRoots; it does not implement UI tabs, IPC transport, or render shell internals.
